# Pull Request | 合并请求

## 📋 描述 | Description

<!-- 请描述这个 PR 做了什么 | Please describe what this PR does -->

Fixes # (issue number | Issue 编号)

## 🔄 变更类型 | Type of Change

<!-- 请选择适用的选项 | Please check the relevant options -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug 修复 | Bug fix (非破坏性变更 | non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ 新功能 | New feature (非破坏性变更 | non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 破坏性变更 | Breaking change (会导致现有功能失效的修复或功能 | fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 文档更新 | Documentation update
- [ ] 🧹 代码重构 | Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ 性能优化 | Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 测试 | Tests

## 🌐 相关引擎 | Related Engine

<!-- 这个 PR 涉及哪个引擎？| Which engine does this PR relate to? -->

- [ ] 通用/核心 | General/Core
- [ ] VASP
- [ ] LAMMPS
- [ ] Abaqus
- [ ] Ansys
- [ ] COMSOL
- [ ] GROMACS
- [ ] Multiwfn

## ✅ 检查清单 | Checklist

<!-- 提交前请确保完成以下检查 | Please ensure you've completed these checks before submitting -->

- [ ] 我的代码遵循项目的代码规范 | My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] 我已经运行了测试并全部通过 | I have run the tests and they all pass
- [ ] 我已经添加了必要的测试 | I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] 我已经更新了相关文档 | I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] 我的提交信息清晰明确 | My commit messages are clear and follow the convention
- [ ] 我没有提交不必要的文件 | I have not committed unnecessary files

## 🧪 测试 | Testing

<!-- 请描述你如何测试这些变更 | Please describe how you tested your changes -->

```bash
# 运行测试的命令 | Commands used to test
pytest
```
